sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n34389" key="e)/mplektos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἔμπλεκ-τος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n34389.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inwoven</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἔμπλεκτον, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen></foreign>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">ashlar filled up with rubble</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.8.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
